targets.rawSql:
SELECT round(sum(s.qty) / 30, 2) AS value
FROM inventory_mart.fact_sales_order_lines s
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
WHERE s.created_date >= today() - 30
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)
SELECT sum(s.available_qty) AS value
FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)

            SELECT sum(s.damaged_qty) AS value
            FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
            WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
              AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
              AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
              AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
              AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
              AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)

            SELECT sum(s.in_transit_qty) AS value
            FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
            WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
              AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
              AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
              AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
              AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
              AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

SELECT
  m.event_date AS time,
  sum(m.qty_in) AS inbound_qty,
  sum(m.qty_out) AS outbound_qty
FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement m
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = m.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = m.warehouse_id
WHERE m.event_date >= today() - 90
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR m.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR m.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY m.event_date
ORDER BY m.event_date

SELECT
  coalesce(w.warehouse_name, m.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
  sum(m.qty_in) AS received_qty,
  sum(m.qty_out) AS dispatched_qty
FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement m
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = m.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = m.sku_id
WHERE m.event_date >= today() - 30
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR m.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR m.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY warehouse
ORDER BY received_qty DESC

panels.title: Receiving vs Dispatch by Warehouse (30 days)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  m.sku_id AS sku_id,
  coalesce(p.sku_name, m.sku_id) AS sku_name,
  coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
  sum(m.qty_in) AS qty_in,
  sum(m.qty_out) AS qty_out,
  sum(abs(m.qty_change)) AS movement_volume,
  round(sum(abs(m.qty_change) * toFloat64(dp.unit_cost)), 2) AS movement_value_proxy
FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement m
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = m.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product dp ON dp.sku_id = m.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = m.warehouse_id
WHERE m.event_date >= today() - 30
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR m.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR m.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY m.sku_id, sku_name, category
ORDER BY movement_volume DESC
LIMIT 20

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
),
latest_stock AS (
  SELECT
    s.snapshot_date AS snapshot_date,
    s.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    s.sku_id AS sku_id,
    round(sum(s.available_qty), 2) AS available_qty,
    round(sum(s.inventory_value), 2) AS inventory_value
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
  WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
    AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
    AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
    AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
    AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
    AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
  GROUP BY s.snapshot_date, s.warehouse_id, s.sku_id
),
recent_moves AS (
  SELECT
    warehouse_id,
    sku_id,
    max(event_date) AS last_event_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement
  WHERE ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
    AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
  GROUP BY warehouse_id, sku_id
)
SELECT
  ls.warehouse_id,
  ls.sku_id,
  coalesce(p.sku_name, ls.sku_id) AS sku_name,
  coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
  ls.available_qty,
  ls.inventory_value,
  rm.last_event_date,
  dateDiff('day', coalesce(rm.last_event_date, ls.snapshot_date), ls.snapshot_date) AS days_since_last_movement,
  if(dateDiff('day', coalesce(rm.last_event_date, ls.snapshot_date), ls.snapshot_date) >= 30, 'No movement >=30d', 'Slowest recent movers') AS movement_flag
FROM latest_stock ls
LEFT JOIN recent_moves rm ON rm.sku_id = ls.sku_id AND rm.warehouse_id = ls.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = ls.sku_id
WHERE ls.available_qty > 0
ORDER BY
  if(dateDiff('day', coalesce(rm.last_event_date, ls.snapshot_date), ls.snapshot_date) >= 30, 1, 0) DESC,
  dateDiff('day', coalesce(rm.last_event_date, ls.snapshot_date), ls.snapshot_date) DESC,
  ls.inventory_value DESC
LIMIT 20

list.name: region
list.label: Region
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT region FROM inventory_mart.dim_warehouse WHERE region != '' ORDER BY region
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT region FROM inventory_mart.dim_warehouse WHERE region != '' ORDER BY region

list.name: warehouse
list.label: Warehouse
list.query: SELECT warehouse_id FROM inventory_mart.dim_warehouse WHERE ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR region IN (${region:singlequote})) ORDER BY warehouse_id
list.definition: SELECT warehouse_id FROM inventory_mart.dim_warehouse WHERE ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR region IN (${region:singlequote})) ORDER BY warehouse_id

list.name: category
list.label: Category
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE category != '' ORDER BY category
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE category != '' ORDER BY category

list.name: brand
list.label: Brand
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND brand != '' ORDER BY brand
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND brand != '' ORDER BY brand

list.name: sku
list.label: SKU
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT sku_id FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR brand IN (${brand:singlequote})) ORDER BY sku_id
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT sku_id FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR brand IN (${brand:singlequote})) ORDER BY sku_id
